name: test12345-contract-validation

riskReview.solidityVersion: 0.4.26 is legacy Solidity and should be treated as audit-required before production use.
riskReview.visibility: enterValue has no explicit visibility in legacy Solidity; defaults should be reviewed and modernized before reuse.
riskReview.accessControl: enterValue is public/open and allows any caller to overwrite the stored string.
riskReview.payability: nonpayable; no ETH receiving path in ABI.
riskReview.storage: single public string variable named test.
riskReview.proxyRisk: not a proxy according to supplied metadata.
riskReview.licenseRisk: license type is None; reuse requires legal/license review.

validationChecks: Confirm target chain and contract address before explorer verification.
Confirm bytecode matches supplied SourceCode, CompilerVersion, OptimizationUsed, Runs, ConstructorArguments, and EVMVersion.
Confirm ABI read method test() returns expected value.
Confirm enterValue(string) is intentionally public and nonpayable.
Confirm no value transfer is required or allowed.
Confirm no private keys, seed phrases, or auto-signing are used during testing.
Prepare unsigned write transaction only after operator review.
Require manual wallet signature for enterValue writes.
Record tx hash only after explorer confirms success.

skygridPolicy.ledgerPosting: only after chain, address, tx hash, method, caller, status, and timestamp are verified

notes: This file stores validation metadata only. It does not deploy, call, approve, transfer, or sign any transaction.
